deploy.startCommand: cd /app/backend && node -e "process.on('uncaughtException', e => { console.error('CRASH:', e.message, e.stack); process.exit(1); }); process.on('unhandledRejection', e => { console.error('REJECT:', e); process.exit(1); }); console.log('Loading server...'); require('./dist/server.js'); console.log('Server loaded');"
